react_icons.reason: Official Gemini icon for AI integration sections
Standard SQLite icon for technical stack rows

downloaded_assets.title: Modern Calm Therapist Office
downloaded_assets.description: Professional therapist office with soft lighting and greenery
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A wide shot of a modern, bright office. A therapist is sitting in a black leather chair facing a client on a green velvet sofa. There is a large green plant in the center and warm light from a designer floor lamp. The atmosphere is professional and calming.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant: soft whites, sage green, and warm wood tones. Matches the 'green/teal' theme perfectly.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: A professional therapist meeting a client in a calming modern office
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Excellent composition for a hero section; clearly portrays a safe professional space without being overly clinical.

downloaded_assets.title: Empathetic Support Session
downloaded_assets.description: Close up of a supportive therapist listening during a session
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A bright indoor scene showing a female therapist with glasses smiling warmly while taking notes on a clipboard, looking towards a client (back to camera). Soft natural light fills the room.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Bright whites and soft grays. Very clean and airy.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: A therapist listening empathetically to a client
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Strong focus on the 'empathy' aspect of the app; good alternative if a human-centric hero is preferred.

downloaded_assets.title: Digital Connection Network
downloaded_assets.description: Abstract glowing spheres connected by light rays
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Glowing digital spheres (nodes) connected by sharp lines of light against a deep teal/blue background. Represents social network analysis and interconnectedness.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Teal and deep blue palette. High contrast.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Abstract visualization of interconnected digital nodes
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Directly matches the 'social media analysis' context with a high-quality abstract network visual.

downloaded_assets.title: Neural Network Illustration
downloaded_assets.description: Minimalist abstract lines representing data flow
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Thin, flowing silver lines on a light gray background connecting tiny nodes. Very minimal and clean.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Light gray and silver. Extremely neutral.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Good for sections where a more subtle, less 'tech-heavy' connection visual is needed.

downloaded_assets.title: Calming Teal Mesh Gradient
downloaded_assets.description: Extremely soft mesh gradient in light teal and white
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A very soft, ethereal blend of light teal/cyan and off-white. No sharp lines, just a gentle wash of color.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Teal #CEF6F5 to white. Perfect for background washes.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Matches the app's teal/green primary theme and 'calming' mood requirements exactly.

downloaded_assets.title: Muted Green Gradient
downloaded_assets.description: Soft gradient blending muted green and sage tones
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A smooth gradient transitioning from a deeper sage green to a light mint. Soft and organic feel.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Sage green #81BDB4 to mint. Organic tones.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Strong alternative that leans more into the 'green' primary color for a more grounded feel.

css_textures.description: Soft radial gradients for the overall page background

usage_notes: Use 'hero-office-1.jpg' for the main dashboard header to set a professional, welcoming tone.
Layer content cards over 'bg-texture-1.jpg' with low opacity to create visual depth in white-space heavy sections.
Use SiGooglegemini from react-icons/si for the Gemini integration badge.
